expectations.text: Recommends <StatusChip> (or shared status component) for the running/degraded/stopped states
expectations.evidence: Component table row: 'Status indicators per state → <StatusChip status=... /> in monochrome / icon-only variant. Canonical component for system state.' Also called out as the deliberate choice over <Badge>.

expectations.text: Recommends semantic color tokens (positive/warning/negative or text-positive etc.) rather than raw Tailwind palette
expectations.evidence: Color section uses text-positive / text-warning / text-neutral-subtle exclusively. Explicit rule: 'No brand violet. Semantic tokens only.' No raw palette classes appear.

expectations.text: Suggests Roboto Mono / tabular-nums / font-mono for the numeric counts
expectations.evidence: Typography section: 'Total count value: text-base font-medium font-mono — Mono so the digit aligns'; status row count uses font-mono; footer timestamp uses font-mono.

expectations.text: Treats the surface as compact (text-sm / text-xs), not a hero unit (no text-2xl/3xl/4xl)
expectations.evidence: Typography uses text-base / text-sm / text-xs only. 'No text-2xl hero number. No intermediate sizes.' Constraints re-checked: 'Compact, not hero: no oversized number, no gradient, no decorative iconography.'

expectations.text: Output includes the five sections the skill specifies: layout skeleton, component choices, typography, color, copy
expectations.evidence: All five numbered sections present: 1. Layout Skeleton, 2. Component Choices, 3. Typography, 4. Color Decisions, 5. Copy Suggestions.

expectations.text: Output does not include code blocks (the skill explicitly says no code)
expectations.evidence: Document is structured prose + tables; no ```...``` code fences anywhere.
